Please provide an outline of the steps you take to assess the qualifications, capabilities and ongoing fitness for work of drivers you employ or engage to perform services under customer services agreements. The outline should contain details of the following minimum requirements:

(i)            Requirements for licenses (up to date for the class of heavy vehicle or combination); 
(ii)           Fitness for work, both physically and psychologically, including drug and alcohol risk management; and 
(iii)          Processes for responding to a driver not being suitably qualified, capable or fit for work.
